creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=a52579079d7b5e8355414eb24f33bae5a9754acf

commit a52579079d7b5e8355414eb24f33bae5a9754acf
Author:     Michiel van Baak Jansen <michiel@vanbaak.eu>
AuthorDate: 2023-04-17 12:29:32 +0000
Commit:     Nuno Teixeira <eduardo@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-04-17 12:32:50 +0000

    net-p2p/lidarr: Update to 1.1.4.3027

    - Added krb5 to the RUN_DEPENDS because of: libSystem.Net.Security.Native.so
      is linked to /usr/local/lib/libgssapi_krb5.so.2.2
      It's a default module in .NET and cannot be disabled.

    ChangeLog:      https://github.com/Lidarr/Lidarr/releases/tag/v1.1.4.3027
    PR:             270895
    MFH:            2023Q2

 3 files changed, 16 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
